common.appTagline: Rare-pet lifecycle portal — pick, vet, shop, farewell — starting in Songpa.

onboarding.title: Pick your first pet
onboarding.description: Choose a rare animal and we'll wire up vets, food, care, community and farewell for you.
onboarding.categoryHint: Each category gets its own specialist vets, shops and community feed.
onboarding.speciesHint: Your dashboard curates everything around this pick.
onboarding.locationHint: We default to Songpa-gu, Seoul. Pick another area or use your current location.
onboarding.currentFailed: Couldn't detect — falling back to Songpa-gu.

categories.birdDesc: Parrots, raptors and rare small birds
categories.mammalDesc: Beyond hamsters — sugar gliders, ferrets etc.

lifecycle.title: Pet lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: From your first pick to a respectful farewell.

stageDesc.pick: Finalize species and location in onboarding

dashboard.title: {{name}}'s portal
dashboard.subtitle: Curated around the species you picked.
dashboard.emptyHospitals: No vets matched your category yet.
dashboard.emptyShops: No shops matched your category yet.

hospitals.title: Specialist vets
hospitals.subtitle: Sorted by distance from your location
hospitals.noResult: No vets match the current filter.
hospitals.mapPlaceholder: Map preview (real KakaoMap renders when API key is configured)

shops.title: Food & gear shops
shops.subtitle: Offline stores and online retailers in one place.
shops.noResult: No shops match the current filter.

care.title: Care guide
care.subtitle: Environment, diet and health checkpoints for your species
care.notFound: No care guide registered for this species yet.

communities.title: Community
communities.subtitle: External forums, cafes and channels for your category
communities.noResult: No community registered for this category yet.

adoption.title: Adoption & rescue
adoption.subtitle: Vetted rescue groups, breeders and adoption hubs
adoption.noResult: No adoption channel registered for this category yet.

funeral.title: Farewell & memorial
funeral.subtitle: Government-registered services and memorial options
funeral.noResult: No farewell service registered for this category yet.

landing.title: A whole lifecycle with rare pets — Pettography
landing.description: Pick → adopt → raise → vet → farewell, all set up from a single choice.
landing.featureSpeciesDesc: Reptiles, arthropods, rare birds and more — at species granularity
landing.featureLocationDesc: Vets and shops near Songpa-gu coordinates by default
landing.featureCareDesc: Environment, diet and health checkpoints on a single screen
landing.featureLifecycleDesc: Adoption to farewell — every stage links to vetted external resources

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Pettography. Location data is mock around Songpa-gu.
